name: Top Chef Hero 2
author: Poki
description: Top Chef Hero 2 is a 2D idle restaurant game created by From the Bench. Manage your own culinary business and make delicious dishes and desserts from all over the world! Hire great chefs and help them produce pies, pizzas, burgers, vegetarian dishes, and desserts. Enjoy managing your happy employees and become the best restaurant in town! How to play: Activate employee or turbo boost - Left click About the creator: Top Chef Hero 2 is created by From the Bench. This is their first game on Poki !
